titles.title: I'll Not Give up the Bible

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ll not give up the Bible, That precious book divine, For glory gilds its pages, And truth adorns each line.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’ll never give up that holy book, I’ll never give up the Bible; I’ll never give up that holy book, That precious book divine.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Though foes may fight against me, And enemies combine, Its precepts still shall guide me, As light from Heav’n they shine.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When fate’s wild storms o’ercloud me, And loud the billows roar, My chart shall be the Bible, To guide to Heav’n’s bright shore.
